Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class TestGivenTypes

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.TestGivenTypes
public class TestGivenTypes extends AbstractTests
Tests for method Formula.getGivenTypes().

    void
    testAssociativeExpression()
    Ensures that given types are propagated through an associative expression.
    void
    testAssociativePredicate()
    Ensures that given types are propagated through an associative predicate.
    void
    testAtomicExpression()
    Ensures that given types are propagated from an atomic expression.
    void
    testBecomesEqualTo()
    Ensures that given types in the right-hand side of a becomes equal to are propagated.
    void

    Ensures that given types in the right-hand side of a becomes member of are propagated.

    Ensures that given types in the right-hand side of a becomes such that are propagated.

    • mHidingRelation

      private static Expression mHidingRelation(Type type)
      Returns a relation from integer to integer that hides the given type.
      Parameters:
      type - an arbitrary type
      Returns:
      an integer relation hiding the given type

    • mHidingRelation

      private static Expression mHidingRelation(String lName, String rName, Type type)
      Returns a relation from integer to integer that hides the given type and contains free identifiers with the given names.
      Parameters:
      type - an arbitrary type
      Returns:
      an integer relation hiding the given type
